---
title: "The Block Pro"
page-layout: article
---

# The Block Pro

## Description

Research and data platform covering digital assets, cryptocurrency markets, blockchain companies, and industry trends. Supports research on crypto, fintech, and decentralized finance.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an account with a valid Yale email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://web.library.yale.edu/access-block-research?_ga=2.30752639.1512418643.1662507458-1442532518.1662507458)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
